/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libolei_interfaces__python.so -o rosidl_generator_py/olei_interfaces/libolei_interfaces__python.so CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/olei_interfaces/msg/_vf_header_s.c.o CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__python.dir/rosidl_generator_py/olei_interfaces/msg/_v2_header_s.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/grz/trolley_auto_drive_image/code/build/olei_interfaces:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libolei_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.8.so libolei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcpputils.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
